name: Grain
description: A meeting capture tool for recording meetings, creating clips/highlights, and sharing/exporting meeting moments with integrations (Zoom, Slack, Notion).

auth_methods.note: Unable to fetch the cited official Help Center article due to repeated gateway/timeout errors (502/timeout), so the claim that no public API auth methods are documented cannot be verified from primary sources at this time.

credential_access.note: Grain's contact and enterprise pages invite visitors to contact sales for enterprise or custom needs, implying programmatic or advanced access is handled via sales/partnership rather than self-serve; documentation does not explicitly state the gating model, so partner_gated is inferred from contact/sales messaging.

api_surface.note: Unable to fetch the official Help Center homepage due to repeated timeouts, so the absence of public REST/GraphQL API documentation cannot be re-verified from primary sources at this time.

buildability.note: There are no public API docs or developer credential signup flows; programmatic integration appears to require contacting Grain (sales/support) for enterprise/custom arrangements, so building against a public API today is blocked.

queries: Grain API developer documentation site:grain.com OR site:developers.grain.com OR grain.com "API" "developer" OR "docs" "grain.com" "developer" "API" "Grain" meeting notes export API
